description: Evaluates certificate management service maturity—centralized certificate stores, creation, distribution, and revocation processes, automation, integration, and certificate store custodianship.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: A certificate management service exists and is reviewed frequently for efficacy.

capabilities.name: Presence of Centralized Certificate Store
capabilities.description: A formal certificate management solution issues and revokes certificates with lifecycle automation, configuration review, and system integration.
evaluation_focus: Integration for certificate generation, distribution, and revocation

capabilities.name: Certificate Creation process
capabilities.description: Certificate creation is formalized, scoped appropriately, automated with protocols like SCEP, and reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Secure Certificate Distribution process
capabilities.description: Certificate distribution is formalized, scoped appropriately, automated with protocols like SCEP, and reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Certificate Revocation process
capabilities.description: Certificate revocation is formalized, scoped appropriately, automated with protocols like SCEP, and reviewed frequently.

capabilities.name: Certificate store custodian
capabilities.description: A dedicated official custodian manages the certificate store rather than unofficial IAM or Active Directory team ownership.

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
